reason: ARCHITECTURE.md has multiple factual errors listing implemented features as 'Future Enhancements'. Exit codes documented as 'not currently implemented' but exec() returns {output, exitCode}. File line count claim is stale (~400 lines, actual 971). Five features fully implemented but listed as future work. architecture.json gap score (85%) is artificially low due to these doc discrepancies.
resolution: Task task-1775614258494 already addresses all 7 discrepancies — currently in review status. ARCHITECTURE.md updates being verified by tester.

discrepancies.documented: All shell logic lives in src/index.ts (~400 lines)
discrepancies.fix: Update to ~970 lines. Consider splitting trigger has been reached per Refactoring Triggers section.

discrepancies.documented: Exit codes: not currently implemented (all commands return strings)
discrepancies.actual: exec() returns Promise<{ output: string; exitCode: number }>. exitCodeFor() maps output patterns to codes 0, 1, 2.
discrepancies.fix: Document that exec() returns {output, exitCode} with exitCode 0 for success, 1 for file/command errors, 2 for syntax/missing operand errors.

discrepancies.documented: Glob pattern support (*, ?, []) listed under Future Enhancements
discrepancies.actual: matchGlob() supports *, ?, [abc], [a-z], [!abc]. expandGlob() handles single-dir and ** recursive. expandPathArgs() auto-expands in commands.
discrepancies.fix: Move to documented feature. Document that glob expansion happens automatically in path args before command execution.

discrepancies.documented: Environment variables ($VAR) listed under Future Enhancements
discrepancies.actual: setEnv(), getEnv(), substituteEnv() implement ${VAR} and $VAR substitution from env map.

discrepancies.documented: Command substitution ($(cmd)) listed under Future Enhancements
discrepancies.actual: substituteCommands() implements $(cmd) with nesting support, depth limiting (maxDepth=3), and backtick syntax.
exec() handles > output, >> append, and < input redirection in execPipeline().
discrepancies.fix: Move to documented feature with description of how exec() handles redirection.

discrepancies.documented: Background jobs (&) listed under Future Enhancements
discrepancies.actual: isBackground(), job tracking Map, jobs/fg/bg commands fully implemented.
